translated: Thank you so much.
Thank you for staying with me for so long.
The 3DMV for "Hashiru, Todoku" that we just watched together has been released, so...
Please check it out.
Oh, sorry, I made a mistake.
Was it 2D?
The 2DMV was just uploaded to the official YouTube channel, so please watch it.
It was the 2DMV.
Sorry about that.
I appreciate your understanding.
Both the 2DMV and the 3DMV... let me summarize.
Both the 3DMV and 2DMV for "Hashiru, Todoku" have just been released on the official YouTube channel.
Sorry, I always get a bit flustered, I apologize.
I'm a little bit...
Once this is over, please go and watch them a lot, everyone.
Thank you very much.
Everyone is saying they'll watch it.
Thank you so much.
And with that, this short ProSeka AfterTalk for the "Glow Glorious Glow" event has come to an end.
To everyone watching the stream, how did you like it?
I'm so happy because everyone's comments were so supportive.
Momojan is truly the best.
They just keep on growing and growing.
Growth with no ceiling is truly dazzling, isn't it?
Thank you so much, everyone, really.
I had a lot of fun.
I really did.
